         MILITARY GOVERM'MENT O F SANTO DOMINGO.
                      Executive Order No. 623.
         TITLE : Additional appropriation for completion of the
                 Yaque ,del Norte Bridge.
                           0. G. No. 3218.
 ,   -    -

     By virtue of the powers vestad in the Military Government
 of Santo Domingo, the following Order is hereby dictated and
 promlulgated :
     There is hereby appropriated from funds in t h e National
Treasury not otherwise appropriated the sum of THIRTY
THOUSAND DOLLARS ($30,00O.00)to cover cost 0% compleb
ion of t h e Monte Cristy-Dajabon Bridge over the Yaque del Nor-
te River.

Santo Domingo, D. R.,
